title: Learning
description: A durable, operator-authored lesson from a run (the carried MemoryRecord shape with user_id->operator_id). This is the LOCAL record; it keeps the local project_id (B2) and may be in any curation_state. The edge->hub payload (sync-learning.schema.json) is the curated subset keyed by project_key. The curation_state enum and the 8 KiB text cap are wedge-introduced (B1, EC-001/CL-7) — the carried field was an open string only ever set to "auto".

uid.description: ULID — the learning's stable id and the hub upsert idempotency key

operator_id.description: Verified operator the learning is attributed to (carried user_id renamed; D-STORE-3, FR-001). On the local record before sync this may be the single-tenant default.

project_id.description: Local project handle (the on-disk path — carried commands.rs:404). The shared cross-operator project_key (normalized git remote, B2) is derived at the sync/enroll boundary, not stored here.

text.description: The lesson. Capped at 8 KiB (EC-001/CL-7) — an oversize save is rejected, never truncated. maxLength is a character bound; the byte-precise check is edge-side (T019d).

tags.description: Optional normalized tags used by recall (carried; defaults to [])

created_at.description: RFC-3339 (…Z, no sub-seconds) — matches the carried atomic-write convention so lexicographic ordering is chronological

curation_state.description: Shareability lifecycle (B1, wedge-introduced): auto (machine-suggested, local) and captured (operator-authored, local) never sync; only curated (operator explicitly marked shareable) syncs (D-DATA-3, FR-011).

source_type.description: Carried provenance hint (default ""); not synced to the hub

source_ref.description: Carried provenance ref (default ""); not synced to the hub
